title: Deploy an Express.js application on Cloudflare Workers
excerpt: title: Deploy an Express.js application on Cloudflare Workers description: Learn how to deploy an Express.js application on Cloudflare Workers. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. In this tutorial, you will learn how to deploy an [Express.js ↗](https://expressjs.com/) application on Cloudflare Workers using the [Cloudflare Workers platform](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/) and [D1 database](https://developers.cloudflare.com/d1/). You will build a Members Registry API with basic Create, Read, Update, and Delete (CRUD) operations.…
